name: career-engine
description: Markdown-first career fieldwork skill for understanding real work, teams, and institutions.

interface.shortDescription: Understand real work, not just job applications
interface.longDescription: A markdown-first plugin that helps users study workplaces, teams, and career tradeoffs through field observation, conversations, and structured reflection.
defaultPrompt: Use career-engine to design a fieldwork plan for understanding whether a target team is actually healthy.
Use career-engine to turn interview notes into a better model of real work.
